title: Dual-excitation multispectral fluorescence lifetime imaging handheld endoscope for label-free metabolic and biochemical imaging of the oral mucosa.
author: Tortorelli G Cuenca R Serafino MJ Caughlin K Busso C Woo VL Plemons J Cheng YL Abraham C Wang YS Hegde R Jo JA
content: S-EPMC12671884 PMC12671884 Dual-excitation multispectral fluorescence lifetime imaging handheld endoscope for label-free metabolic and biochemical imaging of the oral mucosa.
